data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of group size changes after booking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a scenario where the group size changes after booking. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or results from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system supports this behavior or produces a failure report. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming the outcome of the scenario where group size changes after booking.
